info.name: Workday Finance Procurement API
info.description:
API for procurement operations including purchase requisitions, purchase orders, supplier management, supplier invoices, business assets, and the procure-to-pay lifecycle within Workday Financial Management.

Contact Support:
 Name: Workday API Support
 Email: api-support@workday.com
